title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 488.1005 - Fee to accompany request for notice of final or partial distribution
text:
488.1005.  Fee to accompany request for notice of final or partial distribution. — A fee in an amount determined pursuant to sections 488.010 to 488.020* shall accompany each duly acknowledged request for notice of any partial or final distribution or both filed pursuant to section 473.618 with the clerk of the probate division of the circuit court having jurisdiction.
(L. 1996 S.B. 869 § A-3) 
Effective 7-01-97 
*Words "section 514.015" appear in original rolls, which was changed to effectuate the court cost bill.
